channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: US Conducts Major Strikes on Iran in Response to Hormuz Attacks, Spurring Tensions and Oil Price Swings
item.description: The United States has launched over 80 strikes on Iranian military targets in retaliation for attacks on three ships in the Strait of Hormuz, escalating tensions between the two nations. The strikes, ...

item.title: Cretin Family supergroup celebrates Ramones' 50th anniversary with tribute concert in LA
item.description: A new supergroup called Cretin Family, comprising members from Green Day, Blink-182, Rancid, and former Ramones bassist CJ Ramone, has been formed to commemorate the 50th anniversary of the Ramones' s...

item.title: Zverev edges Fritz in Wimbledon clash, Kostyuk advances to semis
item.description: Alexander Zverev secured his place in the Wimbledon semi-finals after a hard-fought victory against Taylor Fritz, ending a seven-match losing streak. The German second seed triumphed 6-4, 6-4, 6-2 on ...

item.title: Impeachment trial of VP Duterte enters third day with procedural developments
item.description: The impeachment trial of Vice President Duterte entered its third day with procedural motions and legal arguments shaping the proceedings. Key developments included the filing of motions to dismiss ce...

item.title: Rugby Players Discuss Challenges of Intentional Knock-Ons and Match Preparations
item.description: Canan Moodie, a key Springboks player, highlights the immense pressure rugby referees face when judging intentional knock-ons during high-stakes matches. He notes that decisions must be made in millis...

item.title: Bijou Phillips Undergoes Successful Kidney Transplant After Health Crisis
item.description: Bijou Phillips, the actress known for her role in 'Raising Hope,' has shared an update on her health following a successful kidney transplant. The actor, who previously revealed her struggle with unde...

item.title: Trump's Mismanagement of Iran War Escalation Draws Criticism from National Security Expert
item.description: A national security scholar criticized President Donald Trump's handling of the Iran conflict, highlighting his inability to provide coherent responses to escalating tensions. Tom Nichols, writing for...

item.title: Colorado Democrat's Climate Activism Contradicts Beef Industry Ties in Competitive Race
item.description: Manny Rutinel, a Democratic candidate for Congress in Colorado’s 8th District, faces scrutiny over his past anti-meat activism conflicting with his current campaign in a region reliant on cattle ranch...

item.title: NBI Investigates Alleged Kill Plot Against VP Duterte Despite Lack of Cooperation from Suspects
item.description: The National Bureau of Investigation (NBI) revealed that Vice President Sara Duterte and her ally, Princess Maui, failed to appear for a probe into alleged threats against her and her family. Senior A...

item.title: Greenlanders Reject Trump's Demand for Control, Assert Sovereignty
item.description: Greenlanders have strongly rejected U.S. President Donald Trump’s renewed call for U.S. control of the Arctic territory, emphasizing that its future should be decided by its own people. At a kayaking ...

item.title: TANESCO to Conduct Power Outages in Morogoro and Tanga for Transmission Line Upgrade
item.description: TANESCO has announced a six-day scheduled power interruption affecting Morogoro and Tanga regions from July 9 to 14, 2026. The outages are part of upgrading the 400kV Chalinze–Dodoma Power Transmissio...

item.title: Study Challenges Link Between Early Success and Adult Achievements in India's Education System
item.description: A recent Science study challenges the belief that child prodigies and early academic toppers automatically become successful adults. The research, analyzing 34,839 top performers across fields like sp...

item.title: ASX declines as oil rises amid Trump's Iran tensions
item.description: Australian shares are expected to open lower, following losses in New York after President Donald Trump hinted at ending a ceasefire with Iran. His comments sent oil prices surging over 8% but later r...

item.title: Angat Dam water levels drop despite monsoon rains
item.description: The Philippine Star reported that despite heavy monsoon rains in Metro Manila, the water level in Angat Dam dropped to 156.98 meters on July 8, 2026, from 157.52 meters the previous day. This decline ...

item.title: House of Reps Investigates N1.3bn Budget Leak to Non-Existent Agency
item.description: The House of Representatives has resolved to investigate the allocation of over N1.3 billion to the non-existent Presidential Foreign Intervention Promotion Council (PFIPC) in the 2026 Appropriation A...

item.title: Evil Dead Burn: A Disappointing Sequel to the Franchise's Most Successful Film
item.description: The review of *Evil Dead Burn* highlights its failure to meet the high expectations set by its predecessor, *Evil Dead Rise* (2023). While the film opens with a tense fishing trip and a deadly car acc...

item.title: OpenAI Unveils GPT-5.6 and Voice Models, Expands Public Access
item.description: OpenAI has announced the public release of its GPT-5.6 models, including Sol, Terra, and Luna, along with new voice models called GPT-Live. The decision follows a government request that initially lim...

item.title: Bumblebees accumulate significantly higher levels of toxic metals than honeybees
item.description: A study from the University of Cambridge reveals that bumblebees collect up to seven times more toxic heavy metals than honeybees, even when foraging in the same areas. Researchers warn that this hidd...

item.title: Iran prioritizes control of Strait of Hormuz over nuclear programme in escalating tensions with the US
item.description: The article discusses how Iran's strategic focus has shifted from its nuclear programme to asserting control over the Strait of Hormuz, a critical maritime route for global energy supplies. Iranian le...

item.title: Mimaropa Sees 48.63% Drop in Focus Crimes
item.description: In Mimaropa, which includes Mindoro, Marinduque, Romblon, and Palawan, focus crimes such as murder, homicide, physical injury, rape, robbery, theft, carjacking, and motorcycle theft have decreased by ...
